case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. CARLOS HUMBERTO GARCIA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CARLOS HUMBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CARLOS HUMBERTO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $87.57 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CARLOS HUMBERTO
